programme.title: Pretty Dangerous Ep08
programme.desc: Undercover agent Poon catches drug lord Kuen Sai Ho, who gets a light sentence. He enlists 3 female operatives to infiltrate the Lau family, while Chief Inspector Kwok grows wary of his secret agenda.

programme.title: Yummy, Yummy? Yummy! Ep23
programme.desc: A girl time travels with her family to ancient Yong'an & opens a tavern with her "secret recipes." She meets the cool, sharp Deputy Prefect, who soon fills her life with laughter & delicious moments.

programme.title: Pretty Dangerous Ep08
programme.desc: Undercover agent Poon catches drug lord Kuen Sai Ho, who gets a light sentence. He enlists 3 female operatives to infiltrate the Lau family, while Chief Inspector Kwok grows wary of his secret agenda.

programme.title: The Imperial Coroner 2 Ep01
programme.desc: In this suspenseful mystery romance, a detective couple unravels the "Blood Jade Case," exposing Nanzhao's invasion & an 18-year-old rebellion.
